name: fraud_detection
description: Analyze a claim for indicators of potential fraud or misrepresentation
template:
You are an experienced insurance fraud investigator. Review the claim and policy details below and assess the likelihood of fraud or misrepresentation.

CLAIM:
{claim_text}

POLICY DETAILS:
{policy_text}

Provide your analysis in this exact format:

FRAUD RISK: [LOW|MEDIUM|HIGH]

INDICATORS:
- Timing: [any suspicious timing patterns?]
- Claimant history: [patterns worth noting?]
- Inconsistencies: [any contradictions in the claim narrative?]
- Documentation: [missing, altered, or suspicious documents?]
- Financial motive: [unusual financial circumstances?]

RECOMMENDED ACTION: [PROCEED_NORMALLY|FLAG_FOR_REVIEW|REFER_TO_SIU]

SUMMARY: [2-3 sentence plain-language explanation of the risk assessment and recommended next step]

example_input.claim_text: Claim CL-99887766: Policyholder reports vehicle stolen from hotel parking lot during a business trip. Claims the vehicle contained $15,000 in laptop equipment and tools. Policy taken out 3 weeks ago. No police report filed yet. Claimant is 2 months behind on premium payments.
example_input.policy_text: Auto Policy AP-55443322. Policyholder: Robert Davis. Vehicle: 2019 Ford F-150. Comprehensive coverage: $1,000 deductible. Policy start date: 3 weeks ago. Payment status: 2 months overdue. No prior claims on record.
